# 搜一搜 实时搜搜索推荐词

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/web_search_sug:
    post:
      summary: 搜一搜 实时搜搜索推荐词
      deprecated: false
      description: |

        | 状态码 | 说明 |
        | --- | --- |
        |  0 | 调用成功 |
        | 20001 | 金额不足 |
        | 3001 | 参数错误 |
        | 50000 |  服务器内部错误 |

        ### 返回结果
        | 字段 | 说明 |
        | --- | --- |
        | ['data']['sug_words'] | 搜索推荐词列表 |
      tags:
        - 其他微信实时搜一搜相关接口
      parameters: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                keyword:
                  type: string
                  description: 关键词
                key:
                  type: string
                  description: jzlkey  0.5/次
                BusinessType:
                  type: integer
                  description: '枚举类型 '
                  format: int32
                  enum:
                    - 0
                    - 1
                    - 2
                    - 7
                    - 51
                    - 52
                    - 262208
                  x-apifox-enum:
                    - value: 0
                      name: 默认
                      description: ''
                    - value: 1
                      name: 公众号
                      description: ''
                    - value: 2
                      name: 文章
                      description: ''
                    - value: 7
                      name: 视频号
                      description: ''
                    - value: 51
                      name: 公众号
                      description: ''
                    - value: 52
                      name: 服务号
                      description: ''
                    - value: 262208
                      name: 小程序
                      description: ''
              required:
                - keyword
                - key
                - BusinessType
              x-apifox-orders:
                - keyword
                - key
                - BusinessType
            example:
              keyword: 人民日报
              key: '{{key}}'
              BusinessType: 2
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  code:
                    type: integer
                  data:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      sug_words:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          type: string
                    required:
                      - sug_words
                    x-apifox-orders:
                      - sug_words
                  cost:
                    type: number
                  remain:
                    type: number
                required:
                  - code
                  - data
                  - cost
                  - remain
                x-apifox-orders:
                  - code
                  - data
                  - cost
                  - remain
              example:
                code: 0
                data:
                  sug_words:
                    - 带娃大大娃娃的大对外
                    - 大娃娃娃
                    - 娃娃的娃
                    - 抓娃抓娃娃
                    - 娃娃娃娃娃
                    - 青蛙娃娃
                    - 小娃娃娃
                    - 我娃娃娃
                    - 娃娃娃菜
                    - 娃娃娃游戏
                cost: 0.5
                remain: 2205.795
          headers: {}
          x-apifox-name: 成功
      security: []
      x-apifox-folder: 其他微信实时搜一搜相关接口
      x-apifox-status: released
      x-run-in-apifox: https://app.apifox.com/web/project/4919579/apis/api-463516678-run
components:
  schemas: {}
  securitySchemes: {}
servers:
  - url: https://www.dajiala.com
    description: 正式环境
security: []

```
